test_cases.description: @import 'tailwindcss' present as first directive in index.css

test_cases.description: Custom token utilities present in compiled CSS bundle (BUG-001)
test_cases.notes: CRITICAL FAIL: Build produces 30.45KB CSS (was 51.25KB). Zero occurrences of bg-surface, bg-primary, text-primary, shadow-card, rounded-card, ease-apple, h-header, w-column in dist/assets/index-*.css. All 160+ custom token utilities absent. UI is visually broken.

test_cases.description: dark: variant compiles to html.dark selector (not prefers-color-scheme) (BUG-002)
test_cases.notes: CRITICAL FAIL: CSS bundle contains @media (prefers-color-scheme:dark){.dark\:...} — dark: variant mapped to OS preference, NOT html.dark class. @custom-variant dark (T-004) missing.
